title: pinus sylvestris f. aurea
intro: Pinus sylvestris f. aurea, also known as the golden Scotch pine, is a variant of the native pine tree found in Northern Europe, characterized by its unique golden-yellow foliage. The medicinal properties of Pinus sylvestris f. aurea include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and terpenes. The health benefits of using Pinus sylvestris f. aurea include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pinus sylvestris f. aurea often involve infusing the needles in hot water to create a tea, or using the essential oil in aromatherapy.
